vulnerability.reference: Visually impaired users rely solely on robot guidance with no fallback, making them acutely vulnerable to any LLM hallucination.
vulnerability.generated: Visually impaired users cannot visually verify the robot's semantic descriptions, making them wholly reliant on its error-prone guidance.

impact.reference: A navigation error may cause physical collision, injury, and immediate loss of user trust in assistive technology.
impact.generated: Physical injury from collisions or falls, disorientation, and eroded trust in assistive robotic systems.

dose_response.reference: LLM-generated erroneous landmarks misdirect guide robots, and visually impaired users, lacking fallback, suffer collisions and immediate trust loss upon error.
dose_response.generated: Erroneous LLM-generated semantic maps and path descriptors, through visually impaired individuals depending on a guide robot, trigger inability to visually verify robot descriptions, leading to physical injury, disorientation, and eroded trust.
